checks.name: State Independence
checks.notes: Skill is fully stateless. Context preserved through physical artifacts (DISCOVERY_LOG.md, VALIDATION_REPORT.md, REGISTRY_INDEX.json, SEARCH_RESULTS.md, INSTALLATION_LOG.md).

checks.name: Artifact Gating
checks.notes: Every transition requires the preceding artifact. VALIDATE gates on DISCOVERY_LOG.md. INDEX gates on VALIDATION_REPORT.md.

checks.name: Intent Preservation
checks.notes: Mandatory 'context' in DISCOVERY_LOG.md and SEARCH_RESULTS.md. Schema validation ensures compliance.

checks.name: Loop Breakers
checks.notes: max_retries: 3 in YAML frontmatter. Wait-For-Human for all-invalid results and installation conflicts.

checks.name: Physical Execution Standards
checks.notes: VALIDATE uses Phased State Machine schema checks. File integrity verified post-installation.

checks.name: Single-File Format
checks.notes: YAML frontmatter combined with Markdown body in SKILL.md.

checks.name: Composite Personas
checks.notes: Clearly defined: Curator (Scout), Inspector (Validate), Librarian (Index), Concierge (Search), Installer (Install), Registry Auditor (Critic).

checks.name: Graceful Degradation
checks.notes: Safety-first: malicious skills blocked. Version conflicts escalated. HITL for edge cases.

checks.name: Separation of Concerns
checks.notes: YAML handles routing logic; Markdown handles cognitive instructions.

checks.name: Agent Agnosticism
checks.notes: No reliance on specific LLM features. Schema-based validation and filesystem operations.
